task_name: AI Scientific Research Technology, Industry, and Policy Analysis Report

subtask1.query: Read workspace/query.md for task requirements, context/operation_list.md for writing steps and instructions, and context/problem_context.md for task background and reference material guidelines. Write a LaTeX research analysis report that meets all requirements (4-6 pages of English body text, at least 10 references, no CSDN/Zhihu or similar sources), and save it as report.tex (and optionally report.pdf) in the current directory.
